name: Whisparr Sync
description: Connects Cove to a Whisparr v3 (Eros) instance. Makes outbound HTTP calls to the Whisparr URL you configure (default port 6969) with an API key you supply, starting with a Test connection that reads GET /api/v3/system/status. The API key is stored server-side only, never returned to the browser and never written to logs. Exposes settings endpoints under /api/extensions/com.alextomas955.whisparrsync. Runs no scraper or downloader code.
author: alextomas955
